narratives.evidence_quote: टीसरा विश्व युद्ध जिद्ा छिडा तो दुनिया में बंत जाइगी!
narratives.reasoning: The text evokes fear of a potential third world war by stating that if the war escalates, the world will be divided into three parts, and many countries will be involved, leading to severe consequences.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: By continuing the war we risk WWIII
subnarratives.evidence_quote: तीसरा विश्व युद्ध छिड़ा तो 3 टुकड़ों में बंट जाएगी दुनिया!
subnarratives.reasoning: The text explicitly mentions the risk of World War III, implying that the ongoing conflict could escalate into a global catastrophe.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: There is a real possibility that nuclear weapons will be employed
subnarratives.evidence_quote: जल्दी युद्धविराम न हो, तो दोनों देशों की आग पूरी दुनिया में फैल जाएगी और चाहे-अनचाहे हर कोई युद्ध का हिस्सा होगा.
subnarratives.reasoning: Although the text does not directly mention nuclear weapons, it implies a catastrophic scenario where the conflict spreads globally, which could potentially involve the use of nuclear weapons.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: कोविड वैक्सीन का असमान बंटवारा भी बनेगा वजह
subnarratives.reasoning: The text mentions the unequal distribution of COVID-19 vaccines as a factor that could contribute to the escalation of the conflict, which supports the parent narrative but does not fit into any of the more specific subnarrative definitions.
